roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT PETITION PC17(B) TO REDUCE & PC1203,4 TO DISMISS - FILED

/CAL:DEFENDANT'S PC 17(B) & PC 1203,4 MOTION/NP/X: NOT REPORTED/X: CONVDATE 12-09-74/X: OLD NUMBER K88188/MO GRTD/X: THE COURT GRANTS THE PETITION FOR REDUCTION OF A FELONY TO A MISDEMEANOR UNDER PENAL CODE 17(B),/CTORD: CHARGE (S) REDUCED FROM A FELONY TO A MISDEMEANOR/X: PURSUANT TO PENALCODE SECTION 1203,4-GUILTY PLEA IS SET ASIDE AND A NOT GUILTY PLEA IS ENTERED, /X: THE COURT GRANTS THE PETITION FOR DISMISSAL UNDER PENAL CODE 1203,4/X: ORDER IS SIGNED AND FILED,/

/CAL: DEFENDANT'S PC1203,4 & PC17(B)PETITION/NP/X: OLD NUMBER K88188/X:CONV DATE 12-09-74/PROG:03-24-22/CTORD: THE ADULT PROBATION DEPARTMENT TOPREPARE A REPORT AND RECOMMENDATIONS REGARDING THE DEFENDANT;S PC1203,4 PETITION,/CONTD: DEFENDANT'S PC1203,4 PC17(B) PETITION 03-24-2022 IN DEPT 18
